title: Update mentor name from Omkar to Onkar

requirements.text: In the About component (frontend/src/components/About.tsx), change the mentor name from 'Omkar sir' to 'Onkar sir' in the mentors list

quotes: Change the name of "Omkar sir" to "Onkar sir"

acceptanceCriteria: The mentors section displays 'Onkar sir' instead of 'Omkar sir'
All other mentor names (Debadip sir, Hari sir) remain unchanged
The visual layout and styling of the mentors section remains intact

nonGoals: Modifying the About section structure or styling
